name: WatchSync
overview: Sync watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD)
description: Automatically synchronizes watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD). When a movie is watched in 4K, the HD version is also marked as watched (and vice versa). Uses IMDB, TMDB and TVDB identifiers to match media between libraries.

versions.changelog: Initial release with automatic sync and scheduled task

name: JellyTag
overview: Overlays quality badges (resolution, HDR, codec, audio, language) on media posters and thumbnails
description: JellyTag automatically overlays quality badges on your media posters and thumbnails. Supports resolution, HDR, video codec, audio, language flags, and VOST indicator. Badges are rendered server-side and visible on all Jellyfin clients. Features per-panel configuration, SVG and text badge styles, custom badge upload, live preview, and library filtering.

versions.changelog: v2: Multi-category badges (resolution, HDR, codec, audio, language, VOST), per-panel config, SVG rendering with SkiaSharp, custom badge upload, live preview, library filtering, config export/import
Initial release with quality detection, configurable badges, and image caching
